skill.name: seo-content-planner
skill.description: Creates SEO content outlines, topic clusters, search intent maps, content calendars, and internal linking plans.
skill.summary: Plan SEO content strategy with outlines, topic clusters, calendars, and linking guidance.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged Ruby backtick execution and weak cryptographic algorithm patterns, but all reviewed locations are ordinary Markdown content in SKILL.md. No executable code, shell command, cryptographic use, prompt injection, data exfiltration, network access, or filesystem behavior was found.

low_findings.title: False positive: Markdown backtick formatting
low_findings.description: The external command detections at SKILL.md lines 25 and 73 are Markdown formatting. Line 25 references a resource path in inline code, and line 73 starts an example output block. No shell execution or command invocation is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The detected characters are inside Markdown prose and a fenced example block. There is no Ruby code, shell command, script file, or user-controlled execution path.

low_findings.title: False positive: Weak cryptography pattern
low_findings.description: The weak cryptographic algorithm detections at SKILL.md lines 3 and 55 match normal SEO planning text, not cryptographic APIs. No hashing, encryption, checksum, or password handling behavior appears in the file.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both lines are plain descriptive Markdown about content planning. The file contains no code that could invoke MD5, SHA-1, DES, or similar weak algorithms.

content.value_statement: SEO planning often becomes scattered across keywords, outlines, calendars, and internal links. This skill organizes those pieces into clear content plans, topic clusters, and publishing priorities.
actual_capabilities: Creates detailed SEO content outlines with audience, intent, sections, and word count targets.
Plans topic clusters with pillar pages, supporting articles, FAQs, comparisons, and resource pages.
Maps informational, commercial, and transactional search intent for a topic.
Builds 30 to 60 day content calendars with topics, keywords, formats, and priorities.
Suggests internal linking opportunities between pillar content and supporting pages.
Identifies content gaps and related angles for broader topical coverage.
limitations: Does not perform live keyword volume, ranking, or SERP research by itself.
Requires user-provided business context, audience details, and target topics for best results.
Does not publish content or connect to CMS, analytics, or SEO platforms.
Recommendations should be validated against current search results and brand guidelines.

use_cases.title: Build a Topic Cluster
use_cases.description: Create a pillar page plan, supporting articles, FAQs, and internal links for a core SEO topic.

use_cases.title: Plan a Publishing Calendar
use_cases.description: Turn keyword themes and campaign goals into a 30 to 60 day content calendar with priorities.

use_cases.title: Outline a Search-Focused Article
use_cases.description: Generate a detailed article outline with search intent, audience needs, sections, and link targets.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Basic Article Outline
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an SEO content outline for [topic]. Target [audience] with [search intent]. Include title ideas, sections, keywords, word count, and internal link ideas.

prompt_templates.title: Plan a Topic Cluster
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate prompt for building topical authority.
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a topic cluster for [main topic]. Include one pillar page, supporting articles, FAQ content, comparison pages, keyword targets, and internal linking recommendations.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Content Calendar
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 60 day SEO content calendar for [business]. Use these themes: [themes]. Include weekly topics, target keywords, format, intent, priority, and internal link targets.

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Gaps and Priorities
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced prompt for improving an existing content portfolio.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this content inventory: [paste list]. Identify topic gaps, overlapping pages, missing search intents, cluster opportunities, and a prioritized publishing plan.

output_examples.input: Plan a topic cluster for small business payroll software.
output_examples.output: The skill returns a pillar guide plan, supporting articles about payroll setup and compliance, comparison content, FAQs, keyword targets, and internal link paths.

output_examples.input: Create a 30 day content calendar for a cybersecurity consulting firm.
output_examples.output: The skill produces weekly topics, search intent labels, suggested formats, target keywords, word count ranges, publishing priority, and internal linking notes.

output_examples.input: Outline an article about choosing project management software.
output_examples.output: The skill provides title options, audience definition, search intent, section headings, subtopics, keyword groups, examples to include, and related pages to link.

best_practices: Provide the business model, target audience, region, product category, and existing content inventory.
Validate recommended topics against current search results, customer questions, and keyword data.
Use the calendar and linking plan together so each new article supports a clear cluster.
anti_patterns: Do not treat generated keyword ideas as verified search volume or ranking difficulty data.
Do not request generic calendars without a target audience, topic, product, or campaign goal.
Do not publish outlines without checking expertise, brand voice, compliance needs, and factual accuracy.

faq.question: Does this skill research live keyword volume?
faq.answer: No. It plans SEO content structure and strategy. Use an SEO tool to verify volume, difficulty, and rankings.

faq.question: Can it create topic clusters?
faq.answer: Yes. It can suggest pillar pages, supporting articles, FAQs, comparisons, and internal links for a main topic.

faq.question: Can it build a content calendar?
faq.answer: Yes. It can organize topics into a 30 to 60 day calendar with formats, priorities, and link targets.

faq.question: Is it useful for existing websites?
faq.answer: Yes. Provide an inventory of current pages so it can identify gaps, overlaps, and cluster opportunities.

faq.question: Does it write full articles?
faq.answer: The skill focuses on planning and outlines. It can guide article structure but is not a complete publishing workflow.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
